titleStmt.title: SII 25.163: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 163. (A.R. No. 163 of 1908.) TIRUNAṞAIYŪR, KUMBAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Siddhanāthasvāmi temple.

This inscription commences with the praśasti Pūmādu-puṇara, etc., of the king. The details of the date of the record viz., regnal year 3, Mithuṉa, śu 12, Thursday and Aṉiḻam (Anusha) regularly correspond to 1120 A.D. June 10.

It registers a sale of iraṇḍēmukkāṇik-kīḻ-mukkāle-mūṉṟu-mākkāṇi of land for 10 kāśu which was deposited into the temple treasury by Pichchan Vannāyagan Paḻandivarājar of Karuppūr in Maṇṇi-nāḍu in Virudarāyabhayaṅkara-vaḷanāḍu, to the Ādichaṇḍēśvaradēvar, the mūlabhṛityas of the temple of Siddēśvaram-uḍaiyār of Pañchavan-mahādēvi-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya in Tirunaṟaiyūr-nāḍu in Kōlōttuṅgaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu by the mahāsabhai of Mummuḍiśōḻa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya in Tirunaṟaiyūr-nāḍu in Bhūpālakulavalli-vaḷanāḍu. The mahāsabhai is stated to have given the land as iṟaiyili, for 122 kāśu received from the Ādichaṇḍēśvaradēvar and undertook to pay the taxes like peruvari, śilvari, tiruvāśaliṟpōnda-kuḍimai etc., on the lands. Since the 6th year of Kulōttuṅgachōḷa, to the day (till the date of the record), the uḍaiyār brought the lands under cultivation but failed to pay the taxes. In the event of this the sabhai raised crops, collected the taxes, provided for the feeding of the apūrvi-śrīmāhēśvaras, who came to worship the deity Siddhēśvaramuḍaiyār and granted it as maḍappuṟam to them.
The above transaction was made by the mahāsabhai of Mummudiśoḻachaturvēdimaṅgalam which met in the temple of Mādari-viṇṇagar-Āḻvār.

It is interesting to note that Tirunaṟaiyūr-nāḍu was included both in Kōlōttuṅgaśoḻa-vaḷanāḍu and Bhūpālakulavalli-vaḷanāḍu. We know that, after whom the division was named, was perhaps only the queens of Vikramachōḷa. The earliest name of the division which should have been coined during the time of Kulōttuṅga I continued to be called in the days of his successor Vikramachōḷa also.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī ...— pūmātu puṇarap puvimātuvaḷara nāmātu viḷaṅka jeyamātu nilava tantiruppatumalar maṉnavar cūṭa manniya Urimaiyāl maṇimuṭi cūṭi ceṅkol ceṉṟu ticaitoṟum vaḷarppa veṅkali niṅki meyyaṟantaḻaippa kaliṅkamiriyak kaṭalmalai naṭātti valaṅkakoḷāḻivarai yāḻi naṭātti Irucuṭarraḷavum Orukuṭai niḻaṟṟi virasiṅhāsanattu mukkokkiḻānaṭikaḷoṭu viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakecari [ panma] rāna tribhuvana śakkravattikaḷ śrī vikkramacoḻa devarkku yāṇṭu muṉṟāvatu midhunanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu duvādaśiyum viyāḻakkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Aniḻatti nānṟu pūpālakula vallivaḷanāṭṭut tirunaṟaiyūrnāṭṭu brahmadeyam śrīmummuṭi coḻa śaturvvetimaṅkalattu māThe continuation of the lines are lost.
taraviṇṇakarāḻvār koyilille dhanmicetu kūṭṭa kuṟaivaṟa kūṭi Iruntu kolottuṅka coḻavaḷanāṭṭu tiruṉaṟaiyūr nāṭṭu brahmadeyam śrī pañcavanmahādevi śaturvveti maṅkalattu siddhiśvaramuṭaiyār koyillil mulabhutyarāy Uḷḷa Āti śaṇṭeśvara devarkku viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇam cetukuṭuttu Ūrkkiḻ Iṟaiyiliyuñ cetukuṭutta nilamāvatu . Aiñcā vākkālukkut teṟku Eṭṭukkūrveṇṇaipaṭṭa rūpāy �(1/4)mukkāl mummāvarai Araikkāṇi muntirikaikkiḻ nālumāvum Itan meṟkkup puḷḷaṭi nilaṅkiḻ mukkāle Oru mā nikki Ippuḷḷaṭikku meṟkku yirāyūr tāmotirapaṭṭa rūpāy 3tma(1/4)mukkāl muṉṟu māmukkāṇi Araikkāṇi muṉtirikai
kku komaṭattuc ceṭṭayapaṭṭa rūpāy 4tma rūpāy 4 nālumā mukkāṇikkiḻ nālumāvum Itan meṟkku kārśavan tirumalaināraṇan puḷḷaṭi nila muntirikai nikki puḷḷaṭikku meṟku komaṭattuc ceṭṭayapaṭṭa rūpāy Iraṇṭumā n Irumāvaraiyum Itan meṟkuk kuḷarūpāynḷa kiḻ rūpāy Iraṇṭumā Orumāvarai Araikkāṇik kiḻaraiye Iraṇṭumāvum Itan meṟku kurovi cantira cekarakkiramavitta rūpāy y muntirikaiyum Itaṉ meṟku tiṭṭai tiruvikkiramak kiramavitta rūpāy y tma kiśakku khu nālumā mukkāṇik kiḻāṟumāvum Itan meṟku Oṭpuṟai nārāyaṇakkiramavitta rūpāy y kiḻakku rūpāy nālu māvin kiḻaraiyum Itan meṟku cempuṅkuṭaiyā rūpāy nilam � Orumāvum
mukkāṇi Araikkāṇik kiḻeṭṭu māvum Āka rūpāy� kiśakku 4 Innilam Oṉṟai yeṭṭu mākkāṇi Araikkāṇik kiḻ nālumāvināl tiruvulakaḷantaruḷinapaṭi nūṟukuḻi koṇṭa torumāvāka Onṟu Oṉṟeyeṭṭu mā mukkāṇiyāka virittu rūpāy � kiḻakku n=tāntu Iraṇṭemukkāṇik kiḻ mukkālemunṟu mākkāṇiyum śakravattikaḷ śrīkolottuṅka coḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu Āṟāvatu mutal Innāḷvaraiyum In nilaṅkaḷ Uṭaiyār kaikkoṇṭu payireṟṟi variyiṟāmaiyil sabhaiyomey payireṟṟi variyiṟuttu vārāninṟa Innilam Uṭaiyār siddhiśvara muṭaiyāraik kumpiṭavanta Āpūrvi śrīmāheśvaraṟku coṟiṭukaikku maṭappuṟa
cempiluṅ kallilum veṭṭukaikku virutarāya bhayaṅkara vaḷanāṭṭu maṇṇi nāṭṭu karuppūruṭaiyān piccan vannāyakan paḻantivarājar Ittevar paṇṭārattu Oṭukkivaitta kācil Innilattukku vilaiyāka mulabhratyarā Uḷḷa Āticaṇṭeśvavaradevarkku nāṅkaḷ koṇṭa kācu 10 Ikkācu pattuṅkoṇṭu Innilam Iraṇṭe mukkāṇikkiḻ mukkāle munṟumākkāṇiyum viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭuttom mulabhratirāyuḷḷa Ātiśaṇḍeśvara devaṟku mummuṭi coḻa śaturvvetimaṅkalattu mahā sabhaiyom . Innilattukku Ūrvāykkālkaḷāl paṇṭāṭu paḻampaṭi nirpāyavum vāravum peṟuvatākavum Innilattukku naṭuvu niṅkalā
l peṟuvatākavum yippaṭi yikkācu pattuṅ koṇṭu yinnilam Iraṇṭe mukkāṇikkiḻOf lines 4 & 7-8.mukkāle muṉṟu mākkāṇiyum viṟṟu vilai Āvaṇañ ceytu kuṭuttom mahāsabhaiyom Innilam Ivvāṇṭu mutaṟ Ūṟkiḻ Iṟaiyiliyāka viṭukaikku Ik koyilil melpaṭi Oṭukkiyirunta kācil mulabhratyarāyuḷḷa Āticaṇḍeśvaradevar pakkal kācu 100 2 10 2 Ikkācu ṉūṟṟirupattiraṇṭuṅ koṇṭu Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭuttom Iṉ nilattukku vanta peruvari cilvariyun tiruvācaliṟ ponta kuṭimaiyum nāṅkaḷe Iṟukkakkaṭavomākavum yivarkaḷ kaṭavārallārākavum Ikkoyilil munniṉṟa
śrīmāheśvararey Innilam kaikkoṇṭu yiṟaiyiliye Ippaṭi Anupavittu Itdharmañ celuttavum ceyyavum kaṭavarkaḷākavum yipparicallatu Eṅkaḷil Oruttar Innilattu yañ collilum Aṉupava virotam paṇṇilum nāṅkaḷe teṇṭamum koṇṭu nilainiṟuttak kaṭavomākavum sabhaiyomāy Aṉupavavirotam paṇṇil dharmmāsanam mutalāka rājasannitiy paṭṭu māheśvarañ ceytukoṇṭu dharmmarakṣai paṇṇik koḷḷap peṟuvārkaḷākavum Ippaṭi cempilum kallilum Uḷḷākki veṭṭuvittukoḷḷap peṟuvārkaḷākavum Ippaṭi Innilam Iraṇṭe mukkāṇi
kkiḻ mukkāle muṉṟumākkāṇiyum viṟṟu Ippaṭi Innilam Iṟaiyili cetuṅkuṭuttu Ikkācuṉuṟṟu muppattiraṇṭum kaiccila Aṟakkoṇṭu vilaip pramāṇamum Iṟaiyilipramāṇamum paṇṇikkuṭuttom mūlabhratyarāyuḷḷa Ādiśaṇḍeśvaradevarkku yimmuṭi coḻaśaturvvetimaṅkalattu ma(ā)hāsabhaiyom . yinta sabhaiyuḷḷi (i)runtu paṇittār sāhaṇai nārāyaṇappaṭṭa somājiyār paṇiyālum Uṟuppuṭṭur tiruveṇkāṭapaṭṭa somājiyār paṇiyālum komāpurattu m karāmpicceṭṭu tiruvaraṅka nārāyaṇar paṇiyālum Iḻakkantiṟattu tiruvara
ṅkatevar paṇiyālum Upi tara śrīpātapaṭṭar paṇiyālum piṟāntūr Aḻakiya maṇavāḷapaṭṭar paṇiyālum kaṇṭeṟṟu kovintabhaṭṭar paṇiyālum kaṇṭeṟṟu tiruvaraṅkatevapaṭṭar paṇiyālum kaṇṭeṟṟu kecavapaṭṭar paṇiyālum kaṇṭeṟṟu palmanātapaṭṭar paṇiyālum Uṟuppuṭur Iḷaiya poṟṟoṇpaṭṭar paṇiyālum piṟāntūr tiruveṇkāṭupaṭṭar paṇiyālum komapiṟattu tāmotarapaṭṭar paṇiyālum(mu) Ivvūr(r) sūriyadeva paṭṭar paṇiyālum Āka Uḷḷiṭṭār paṇiyāl Ivvilai pramāṇamum Eḻuti nentakoṇṭa koṭṭamuṭaiyān śrītaran Āḷuṭaiyān kovintanen Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku sāha
paṭṭa somājiyen Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku komapurattu cirāmapaṭṭan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Uṟuppuṭṭur tiruveṇkāṭapaṭṭa somājiyen Eḻuttu Ippaṭikkut tiruvaraṅka tevapaṭṭan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku komapiṟattu ciriḷaṅkopaṭṭan Eḻuttu piṟattu viṣṇumurtti paṭṭan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kaṇṭeṟṟu śrīpātapaṭṭan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kaṇṭeṟṟu tiruvaraṅka tevapaṭṭan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku karāmpicceṭṭu tiruvaraṅka nārāyaṇa paṭṭan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku piṟāntūr Aḻakiya maṇavāḷapaṭṭan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kaṇṭeṟu vallapa ṭikku kaṇṭeṟṟu kecavapaṭṭan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku piṟāntūr tiruveṇkāṭu pa
-ṭeṟṟu Aḻakiya maṇavāḷapaṭṭan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku muppirāl sūriyadevapaṭṭar samñaiyāta
-ṇavāḷapaṭṭan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku yiḻakkan tiṟattu ponmalaipaṭṭan Eḻuttu ...
Digital edition of SII 25.163 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
